overview: Sri Balaji Premium Charcoal is a complete e-commerce website for a charcoal supplier with 20+ years of experience. Customers can browse products, add to cart, fill delivery details, and place orders online. The site features a dark, bold design with orange accents and a WhatsApp floating button.
features: Home page with hero banner, product previews, about section, and business stats
Products page with 5kg and 10kg packs, specifications, and add-to-cart
Shopping cart with quantity controls and total calculation
Checkout with delivery form and payment method selection (UPI, card, net banking)
Location page with address, business hours, and delivery areas
WhatsApp floating button on all pages
Footer with quick links and contact info on all pages
